label: Deep Revenue Pak
blurb: RevOps, Advanced Sales & Procurement. Margin extraction and deal velocity.

skills.label: Sales Tax Nexus Monitor
skills.method: Tracks shipping/billing addresses across states; alerts finance the exact moment the company crosses the threshold to collect local sales tax in Ohio.

skills.label: Contract Uplift Executor
skills.method: Triggers on contract anniversary dates, automatically applying the 5% CPI (inflation) price increase and emailing the client the updated invoice.
trigger_examples: enforces contractual revenue bumps that humans forget to do

skills.label: Cpq Discount Approval Router
skills.method: Intercepts quotes with \>20% discounts, checks the rep's win rate and the client's logo value, and routes to the VP of Sales with a summary.
trigger_examples: protects margins without slowing down deal momentum

skills.label: Commission Clawback Reconciler
skills.method: Tracks customer churn dates against sales rep payout schedules, automatically deducting clawbacks from their next payroll run.
trigger_examples: stops finance from bleeding cash on canceled deals

skills.label: Procurement Tail Spend Consolidator
skills.method: Identifies 50 different employees buying office supplies from 50 different sites, forces all future purchases through one negotiated Amazon Business portal.

skills.label: Software License True Up
skills.method: Compares a client's contracted 100 seats against their actual 120 active logins, generating the invoice for the overage.

skills.label: Partner Deal Registration Conflict
skills.method: Checks channel partner leads against the internal CRM to prevent two different agencies from claiming commission on the same buyer.
trigger_examples: solves the biggest headache in channel sales

skills.label: Rfp Win Loss Analyzer
skills.method: NLP analysis of lost RFP feedback to identify pricing, feature gaps, or competitor mentions, updating the sales enablement wiki automatically.

skills.label: Territory Carving Balancer
skills.method: Re-draws sales territories based on account density, ARR potential, and rep quota capacity so no one gets an unfair patch.
